reviews.review_description:
This is a real game, with a lot of content. 
Concept is great, gameplay is fun!

Dear developer great work, please continue and please add a mixed reality mode

developer_response.body:
Thanks! We are thrilled you are enjoying the game.
We are a very small studio, if we get enough traction we'd love to continue to grow Sucker Punch. Mixed reality would be super fun!

reviews.review_description: I almost didn’t buy this game as there haven’t been any reviews in over a year, but I am very glad I did! Great game and additive quick matches made me want to play “just one more”.

developer_response.body: Thanks! We are thrilled you are enjoying our game!

reviews.review_title: App Lab gem and great exercise
reviews.review_description: To start, this should be on the official store. This has a simple base concept but does it well. Think Pong from the 70’s, add in boxing, and bring it perfectly into VR. Clean graphics, great progression with a good risk/reward system, and unique upgrades. I’ve found that increasing haptics and boosting volume on sound effects does improve the feedback. Definitely a full body experience (though obviously more upper than lower body). The one on one duel aspect brings some similar feels as I get from Blaston. A few things I’d like to see would be some more environments and music…..or even better, pass through mode (like Blaston) and ability to play your own music (or YouTube) in game. Otherwise, an awesome VR experience!

developer_response.body: Thanks! We hope to be on the official store some day! Great reviews like yours help us to get there!

reviews.review_description:
Stumbled on this accidentally and it's my new favorite game. Feels like a better workout than FitXR, Powerbeats, and X-Booster, where you're just punching in a rhythm and not working on reaction time. The music isn't the best (I can put mine on in my room) and I'm not sure how multiplayer works (it would be nice to get a room code to invite my friend). Also my wrist is killing me from slamming on it to activate my power glove (is there an easier way?) 

But what this game does have is decent graphics, an awesome leaderboard structure, and ways to advance at your own pace. I discovered this morning if league play gets too intense, a training match can be chosen at a different skill level depending how you feel. That's great to have! Also the daily bonus is a great motivator to play every day. Awesome work, devs!

Update: For weeks now the game has been screwing me out of my 5-day bonus reward, randomly resetting me to day 1. Extremely frustrating and demotivating. You can have the stars back when you fix this.

developer_response.body: Thank you for the review! We are sorry to hear you are having this issue. Please know we are working diligently with Meta to iron out any data loss problems.

reviews.review_description: I'll just start off by saying why this isn't on the official store is beyond me 🤷‍♂️ It's a high intense boxing workout, you just don't realise it as your having so much fun smashing the blocks back trying to defeat the bot facing you. The ability to upgrade your gloves with different special abilities keeps you coming back and there are also daily challenges to mix it up and a new arcade mode. Give it a go!

developer_response.body: Thanks for the great review!....we look forward to one day being accepted onto the main Quest store.

reviews.review_title: Suckered me in, needs work to be fun.
reviews.review_description:
edit after weeks of having the game. my first negative review of an app, hopefully can help!

*likes*
- variety of stages
- gloves - they look cool on
- interesting concept that is unique.

*dislikes*
- not fun.  not addictive/exciting. why? there is no physical strategy; you lose to the bots because they have better gloves or assists, not because they are better at the game itself. even when you win, it doesn't feel like you are winning because you are better at the game, and when you lose it doesn't feel like you are losing because the opponent is better, either = no satisfaction or motivation
- no strategy. again, this kind of goes along with why the game is not fun, but you can't really control the speed of the cubes, and you definitely can't aim them.  in air hockey or ping pong, part of the fun is aiming, bouncing off walls, shooting it so fast that your opponent can't return it, etc.  not really possible to do here. a potential solution would be making it so players can select/change a return lane.  maybe if there where a way to select a block as it approaches and then drag it into a new lane to set the return lane, then knock the h*** out of it when it gets there - maybe that could make it fun?  Or alternately "catch" the block, thow it up, and then knock it down one of the lanes (kind of like a serve).  That might make it more fun.  not sure, but definitely needs the element of strategy that requires good technique 
- punching feels off, and is the main mechanic of the game - my glove often go through a cube but it has no effect.  probably because i'm not hitting the cube's front face, but in real life hitting something with a swiping motion from the side would send it backwards.  would like to see some more life-like physics in the punching
- way too slow to start a game - either make less punching or faster responses or both
- opening/menu feels like superhot (white and blocky, with similar sound effects) but doesn't match the feel of the game/levels

developer_response.body: Thanks for the review, and thanks for all of your input. We love to hear from our players. We are updating Sucker Punch regularly, adding more features, content, and continually tweaking game play.

reviews.review_description:
4 different challenge levels, good workout and power ups that can turn the tide of the battle. A nice variation (evolution) of boxing games. I definitely recommend it.

Still a great game and it is on sale. In my original review I compared it to a rhythm game but is more in the lines with a boxing workout. I tend to feel more strained with this one than beat sabre. I recommend you try it!

Its tough to create a game in a new medium and there are so many games that are just thrown together. I have seen others that are as good as this game and they just get overlooked. To the developer you did a great job with this. I am sure that if you keep up what your doing you can strike gold in the VR market. 

Cheers!

developer_response.body: Thank you for the kind words! We love that you love our game!

reviews.review_description: I could buy a Meta quest just after experiencing this game. It's exactly what I would wish to have. Thanks a lot. But please keep updating and make more features on top of that.

reviews.review_title: not enough stars avaliable for this star
reviews.review_description: This game is incredible. Don't be fooled by its bright colours and incredible backdrops. This game is a work out. Think of Ping Pong meets boxing. Deserves to be on the main store not AppLab. honestly try it for yourself!

Great fun & very addictive. I wanted a game that is a bit of a workout as well as enjoyable to play and I found it! 

I love the customisation and that you earn coins to buy new gear. Great for working on reflexes and when the pace picks up it defiantly gets the heart pumping.

I wasn’t able to find a multiplayer game yet so I hope to see this game grow and become more popular. It deserves to be!
Game is a ton of fun. Took me a couple of rounds to get used to everything, but once it clicked, I realized how genius the game really is. Love it. Definitely pick it up, and give it a try!
Thats it:)

UPDATE: Arcade Mode

I'm not going to lie, Sucker Punch VR did fall down my list of games I play after a while, and that's not unusual with VR games as you want to try new things. I hadn't got bored of it, it's just other games get released and it's easy to forget about certain games.

Then I was browsing Facebook and saw the ad for the new Arcade Mode and immediately went and played it.

Wow! Sucker Punch has jumped straight back up to the top of my games I want to play.

Sound FX have improved (may have happened before the new Arcade Mode) and the new mode is brilliant!!

I'd like to also repeat what I suggested in my original review - My favourite game on the Oculus from the very beginning is Racket: Nx and it has remained my favourite game after over a year of owning an Oculus. No game has ever replaced the addictiveness of it. The reason for this is a) The Arcade Mode is amazing (same as Sucker Punch's Arcade Mode) b) It's a decent workout (Sucker Punch is a better workout!!) and c) I can play my own music while playing (which would be the icing on the cake for Sucker Punch).

Sucker Punch has two of the three things that kept me coming back to Racket Nx. It just needs the option to play your own music!!!

Especially if I get better at the Arcade Mode, there's potential for a 30+ minute workout in this mode and when people workout they like to listen to there own music. Sure the music in Sucker Punch is fine, but if you're playing for 30 minutes it gets repetitive as there isn't a lot of different music to listen to.

I would like to hear the Developer's thoughts on this?

Highly highly recommended game!

Well done!!!

___________________________________

I don't think I have updated a review as many times as I have for this game.

My first impressions were that this was fun, nothing special, but now after playing this for an extended period I have found myself hooked and wanting to be the first game I play when I start a session on the Oculus.

PROS
+ Addictive!! Playing against an opponent, making sure you win so you don't lose your gloves (that you have taken time to purchase with the in-game currency) is at times nerve-wracking! You can use the currency to take out insurance so you don't lose the gloves, but that's wasting your money you've taken time to build!!

+You eventually build up a game plan for each match with the equipment you buy to try and counter your opponent's game plan. Again, addictive!!

+The added bonus here is while this is very addictive, you are also having a superb workout making you sweat while having a lot of fun!!

+Very well presented (if a little too in your face at times!)

+Leagues, Multiplayer (currently beta) and fun daily challenges

+Developers respond to criticism very quickly and are very open to ideas.

SUGGESTIONS
* I would like the opportunity to play my own music while playing. Would definitely add longevity to this awesome game. But it's not essential.

* While playing I continuously thought a cool "voice guy/gal" making in-game announcements would make the game even better!!

I look forward to what this game brings in the future!

5 out of 5 without a doubt!!

Find us on Facebook - Group name "Ridoculus - Oculus Quest / SideQuest / App Lab"

developer_response.body:
Thanks! We are excited about the new Arcade Mode too, and we are really happy you like it!
Very kind words and we are so thankful for such enthusiastic players!
We have looked into options to play your own music, but have not gotten to work that into our update queue. Definitely something we'd like to bring to our players. We are committed to continue to update Sucker Punch VR and keep bringing you new fresh content!

reviews.review_description:
VR Fitness has a new player in town 👀 Don't just box... you want to SuckerpunchVR. This is what gamified VR Fitness should look like. Heart pumping, sweat breaking movements wrapped up in Fun 🥳 

A well built and fairly polished game. 

Up to date review / impressions in link below 🖖

https://t.co/qtWkyLy182

If you've played any other VR boxing game before, you'll see that Sucker Punch has really refined the game by adding power-ups to the game. You can now use different power-ups, and you can use them in different ways; you can also select your favorite power-ups in each hand. I think the gameplay is pretty much perfect because it is easy to play and hard to master. I definitely recommend this game for fans of VR boxing.

reviews.review_title: Best workout you can get on the Quest!
reviews.review_description: This game is really addictive and it gets my heart pumping quicker than ANY other VR game out there. I guarantee that after 5 minutes you will be writhing on the floor in agony, in a pool of sweat, and gulping down air like it’s going out of style……in all the best ways haha. Then after that, for some reason….you will want to do it again. There are tons of powerups to unlock and you really feel yourself getting better as you continue to play. It’s just a really rewording experience and I can’t believe this isn’t on the official store.

I cannot fault this game... seriously, I'm trying to thing of something that is wrong with the game and I can't think of anything.

This game will give you a good workout and if playing online with friends, you'll have a good laugh too!

Essentially you must punch blocks back at your opponent and not let blocks get past you... sounds simple right? Now add in floating bots and different glove powers and it's a whole new challenge!

We'll worth it and you can check out my footage of it over on my channel: https://youtu.be/s97IiYmDkX8

#GameOn

I am officially addicted!  It was super easy to learn and play.  (My kids love it).  Love all of the glove and drone options.  League play is great - the drones get harder as you progress.  Was surprised by how much of a workout I got.  Definitely a fun alternative to cardio!  Overall great game / and for the amount I play - a great value.

I like pong as I’m a old school guy but this way over delivered. I love it, great way to elevate heart rate and have fun doing it. I can’t wait to see how this game further develops. Definitely a huge fan

developer_response.body: Thanks Jx2Miami! So happy to hear you are loving the game. Stay tuned...we have much more to come!

reviews.review_description: This one surprised the heck outta me. Kinda figured it would be a 1-and-done type game but it turned into a top game on my quest. It’s not a complicated game but what little it does, it does well. I get a legit workout and sweat.
